title: eurybia hemispherica
intro: Eurybia hemispherica, also known as the Ocean Spray, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family, commonly found in coastal regions and salt marshes. The medicinal properties of Eurybia hemispherica include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, while also exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Eurybia hemispherica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
